title: Disabled Veteran Property Tax Exemption
summary: Colorado offers a property tax exemption for qualifying disabled veterans on their primary residence.

requirements.notes: Applies to the veteran’s primary residence only. Exemption amount is set by state law and may change.

eligibilityNotes: Veteran must be rated 100% Permanent and Total due to service-connected disability. Surviving spouses may remain eligible if they do not remarry. Apply through the County Assessor.

title: Vehicle Registration Fee Exemption for Disabled Veterans
summary: Colorado provides vehicle registration fee exemptions for qualifying disabled veterans.

requirements.notes: Eligibility thresholds and covered fees may vary; applies to one vehicle.

eligibilityNotes: Veterans must meet disability requirements and apply through their County Motor Vehicle Office.

title: Disabled Veteran License Plate
summary: Special license plates for eligible disabled veterans, which may include parking and fee benefits.

requirements.notes: Disability threshold and benefits depend on plate type.

eligibilityNotes: Issued by the Colorado DMV with verification of VA disability status.

title: Colorado State Parks Disabled Veteran Pass
summary: Free or discounted access to Colorado State Parks for qualifying disabled veterans.

requirements.notes: Pass types and eligibility thresholds may vary.

eligibilityNotes: Apply through Colorado Parks and Wildlife with proof of disability.

title: Reduced-Fee Hunting & Fishing Licenses for Disabled Veterans
summary: Colorado offers reduced-fee hunting and fishing licenses to qualifying disabled veterans.

requirements.notes: Eligibility depends on VA disability rating and residency.

eligibilityNotes: Licenses are issued through Colorado Parks and Wildlife.

title: Colorado Veterans Employment Preference
summary: Veterans may receive preference in hiring for Colorado state government positions.

requirements.notes: Disabled veterans may receive additional preference points.

eligibilityNotes: Applies to qualifying veterans seeking state employment. Documentation such as DD-214 may be required.

title: Colorado State Veterans Community Living Centers
summary: Long-term care facilities providing nursing and assisted living services for eligible veterans.

requirements.notes: Admission depends on medical need, eligibility determination, and bed availability.

eligibilityNotes: Colorado operates multiple Veterans Community Living Centers across the state.

title: Colorado State Veterans Cemeteries
summary: State-operated cemeteries providing burial options for eligible veterans and family members.

requirements.notes: Eligibility generally mirrors VA national cemetery rules.

eligibilityNotes: Includes multiple cemetery locations throughout Colorado.
